schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
schemes.benefit: Rs 5 lakh/year health insurance per family

schemes.name: Janani Suraksha Yojana
schemes.benefit: Rs 1400 (rural) / Rs 1000 (urban) cash for institutional delivery

schemes.name: PM Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
schemes.benefit: Free ante-natal checkup on 9th of every month

schemes.name: National Health Mission
schemes.benefit: Free essential medicines, diagnostics, and primary health care
documents: No strict requirement for primary care

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Programme
schemes.benefit: Free dialysis for BPL kidney patients

schemes.name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram
schemes.benefit: Free health screening and treatment for children 0-18
schemes.eligibility: All children from birth to 18 years

schemes.name: PM Atmanirbhar Swasth Bharat Yojana
schemes.benefit: Funding for health infrastructure across urban/rural areas
schemes.eligibility: Citizens benefiting from upgraded health facilities

schemes.name: Mission Indradhanush
schemes.eligibility: Children up to 2 years and pregnant women

schemes.name: Jan Aushadhi Scheme
schemes.benefit: Generic medicines at 50-90% lower cost at Jan Aushadhi stores

schemes.name: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission
schemes.benefit: Digital health ID (ABHA), linked health records

schemes.name: PM Mental Health Care Scheme (NIMHANS)
schemes.benefit: Free mental health services via government hospitals

schemes.name: Niramaya (Disability Health Insurance)
schemes.benefit: Health insurance up to Rs 1 lakh for persons with disability

schemes.name: Nutritional Support to Cancer Patients
schemes.benefit: Free nutritional supplements at AIIMS and government cancer centers

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana
schemes.benefit: Improved tertiary healthcare via AIIMS and upgraded hospitals
schemes.eligibility: All citizens accessing government tertiary hospitals
